---
name: Task
about: Quick technical or architectural task
title: '[TASK] '
labels: ''
assignees: ''
---

**Task description**  
Briefly describe what needs to be done.  
Ex. Setup Neo4j and local Kubernetes environment.

**Goal / Purpose**  
Why this task is needed.

**Notes / Steps (optional)**  
Any additional details, instructions, or links.

**Done when**  
- Task completed  
- Environment/configuration verified (if applicable)  
- Documentation updated (if needed)
